commands.name: generate

options.name: --cli-framework
options.description: Hint or override the detected CLI framework for  non-native analysis.

options.name: --command
options.description: Override the root command name used for generated  OpenCLI documents.

options.name: --configuration
options.description: Build configuration passed to dotnet run/build  (e.g. Release).

options.name: --crawl-out
options.description: Write crawl.json when the selected acquisition  mode produces crawl data.

options.name: --cwd
options.description: Working directory used when invoking dotnet.

options.name: --framework
options.description: Target framework moniker passed to dotnet  run/build (e.g. net10.0).

options.name: --json
options.description: Emit the stable machine-readable JSON envelope  instead of human output.

options.name: --launch-profile
options.description: Launch profile to use for dotnet run native  mode.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Skip the implicit build step for dotnet  run/build.

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable ANSI color sequences in human-readable  console output.

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Skip the implicit restore step for dotnet  run/build.

options.name: --opencli-arg
options.description: Override the arguments used to invoke the  project's OpenCLI export command.

options.name: --opencli-mode
options.description: OpenCLI acquisition mode: native, auto, help,  clifx, static, or hook.

options.name: --out
options.description: Write the generated OpenCLI JSON to this file  instead of stdout.

options.name: --output
options.description: Override the output mode. Supported values are  human and json.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-essential console output.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout in seconds for dotnet execution.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Increase diagnostic detail in machine-readable  failures.

options.name: --with-xmldoc
options.description: Enrich the generated OpenCLI document with XML  documentation when the source CLI exposes it.

options.name: --xmldoc-arg
options.description: Override the arguments used to invoke the source  CLI's XML documentation export command.

arguments.name: PROJECT
arguments.description: Path to a .NET project file  (.csproj/.fsproj/.vbproj) or a directory containing one.

commands.name: exec

options.name: --cli-framework
options.description: Hint or override the detected CLI framework for  non-native analysis.

options.name: --command
options.description: Override the root command name used for generated  OpenCLI documents.

options.name: --crawl-out
options.description: Write crawl.json when the selected acquisition  mode produces crawl data.

options.name: --cwd
options.description: Working directory to use when invoking the source  CLI.

options.name: --json
options.description: Emit the stable machine-readable JSON envelope  instead of human output.

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable ANSI color sequences in human-readable  console output.

options.name: --opencli-arg
options.description: Override the arguments used to invoke the source  CLI's OpenCLI export command.

options.name: --opencli-mode
options.description: OpenCLI acquisition mode: native, auto, help,  clifx, static, or hook.

options.name: --out
options.description: Write the generated OpenCLI JSON to this file  instead of stdout.

options.name: --output
options.description: Override the output mode. Supported values are  human and json.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-essential console output.

options.name: --source-arg
options.description: Additional arguments passed directly to the source executable before the export command.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout in seconds for source execution.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Increase diagnostic detail in machine-readable  failures.

options.name: --with-xmldoc
options.description: Enrich the generated OpenCLI document with XML  documentation when the source CLI exposes it.

options.name: --xmldoc-arg

commands.description: Generate opencli.json from a local executable or  script.

commands.name: package

options.name: --cli-framework
options.description: Hint or override the detected CLI framework for  non-native analysis.

options.name: --command
options.description: Override the root command name used for generated  OpenCLI documents.

options.name: --crawl-out
options.description: Write crawl.json when the selected acquisition  mode produces crawl data.

options.name: --json
options.description: Emit the stable machine-readable JSON envelope  instead of human output.

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable ANSI color sequences in human-readable  console output.

options.name: --opencli-arg
options.description: Override the arguments used to invoke the  installed tool's OpenCLI export command.

options.name: --opencli-mode
options.description: OpenCLI acquisition mode: native, auto, help,  clifx, static, or hook.

options.name: --out
options.description: Write the generated OpenCLI JSON to this file  instead of stdout.

options.name: --output
options.description: Override the output mode. Supported values are  human and json.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-essential console output.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout in seconds for package install and command execution.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Increase diagnostic detail in machine-readable  failures.

options.name: --version
options.description: Package version to install and analyze.

options.name: --with-xmldoc
options.description: Enrich the generated OpenCLI document with XML  documentation when the source CLI exposes it.

options.name: --xmldoc-arg
options.description: Override the arguments used to invoke the source  CLI's XML documentation export command.

arguments.name: PACKAGE_ID
arguments.description: NuGet package id for the .NET tool package to  analyze.

commands.description: Generate opencli.json by installing and analyzing a  .NET tool package.
Generate raw OpenCLI JSON from a package, executable, or  .NET project.

commands.name: file
html

options.name: --accent
options.description: Custom accent color for light mode (hex, e.g.  "#7c3aed").

options.name: --accent-dark
options.description: Custom accent color for dark mode (hex). Falls back to --accent if omitted.

options.name: --color-theme
options.description: Set the color theme (cyan, indigo, emerald,  amber, rose, blue).

options.name: --command-prefix
options.description: Override the CLI command prefix used in  generated examples and the composer.

options.name: --compression-level
options.description: Compression level: 0 = none, 1 = compress  embedded JSON, 2 = self-extracting bundle (default 2).

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview the resolved render plan without  writing files.

options.name: --enable-nuget-browser
options.description: Enable the NuGet package browser on the viewer home screen.

options.name: --enable-package-upload
options.description: Enable local package upload on the viewer home screen.

options.name: --enable-url
options.description: Allow the viewer to load OpenCLI inputs from  URL query parameters.

options.name: --include-hidden
options.description: Include commands and options marked hidden by  the source CLI.

options.name: --include-metadata
options.description: Include metadata sections in the rendered  Markdown or HTML output.

options.name: --json
options.description: Emit the stable machine-readable JSON envelope instead of human output.

options.name: --label
options.description: Custom label shown in the viewer header (e.g.  a version string).

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable ANSI color sequences in human-readable console output.

options.name: --no-composer
options.description: Hide the interactive command composer from the generated HTML app.

options.name: --no-dark
options.description: Disable dark mode in the generated HTML app.

options.name: --no-light
options.description: Disable light mode in the generated HTML  app.

options.name: --no-theme-picker
options.description: Hide the color theme picker from the viewer  toolbar.

options.name: --out-dir
options.description: Directory where the HTML app bundle should be  written.

options.name: --output
options.description: Override the output mode. Supported values are human and json.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Allow existing output files or directories to  be replaced.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-essential console output.

options.name: --show-home
options.description: Show the viewer home screen button in the  generated HTML app.

options.name: --single-file
options.description: Emit a single self-contained HTML file with  all assets inlined. Works from file:// without a web server.

options.name: --theme
options.description: Set the initial theme mode (light or dark).

options.name: --title
options.description: Override the CLI title shown in the viewer  header and overview.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Increase diagnostic detail in the rendered  summary output.

options.name: --xmldoc
options.description: Optional XML documentation file used to enrich missing descriptions.

arguments.name: OPENCLI_JSON
arguments.description: Path to the OpenCLI JSON export file to  render.

commands.description: Render an HTML app bundle from an OpenCLI JSON  file and optional XML enrichment file.

commands.name: markdown

options.name: --command-prefix
options.description: Override the CLI command prefix used in  rendered Markdown examples.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview the resolved render plan without  writing files.

options.name: --include-hidden
options.description: Include commands and options marked hidden by  the source CLI.

options.name: --include-metadata
options.description: Include metadata sections in the rendered  Markdown or HTML output.

options.name: --json
options.description: Emit the stable machine-readable JSON envelope instead of human output.

options.name: --layout
options.description: Markdown layout mode. Supported values are  single, tree, and hybrid.

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable ANSI color sequences in human-readable console output.

options.name: --out
options.description: Single Markdown file to write when using the  single layout.

options.name: --out-dir
options.description: Output directory to write when using the tree  or hybrid layout.

options.name: --output
options.description: Override the output mode. Supported values are human and json.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Allow existing output files or directories to  be replaced.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-essential console output.

options.name: --split-depth
options.description: Depth at which hybrid layout emits one file  per command group (defaults to 1).

options.name: --title
options.description: Override the CLI title shown in Markdown  headings and overview text.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Increase diagnostic detail in the rendered  summary output.

options.name: --xmldoc
options.description: Optional XML documentation file used to enrich missing descriptions.

arguments.name: OPENCLI_JSON
arguments.description: Path to the OpenCLI JSON export file to  render.

commands.description: Render Markdown from an OpenCLI JSON file and  optional XML enrichment file.
Render docs from saved OpenCLI export files.
